title: Service entrypoint contract
go_no_go_summary: Claude rated the S01 engineering deliverable GO with no P0/P1/P2 findings. Two P3 notes were informational and explicitly deferred because the substantive guarantees are preserved by the declaration-only boundary, the prior S01 convention, and the intentionally stronger context list.

findings.title: Database/storage no-write asserted in prose rather than discrete booleans
findings.summary: Claude noted that audit and product-state no-write are explicit structured flags, while database and storage no-write are asserted in README prose and guaranteed by the declaration-only object.
findings.resolution: Deferred as informational. This matches the established S01 convention and the substantive guarantee holds because the contract is a frozen declaration-only object with no runtime route, no service execution, no audit event writes, no review queue writes, and writes_product_state:false.

findings.title: Review contexts are a superset of the eight named contexts
findings.summary: Claude noted that the contract carries 10 reviewContextIds: the eight required named contexts plus human_approval_boundary_context and blocked_claim_context.
findings.resolution: Deferred as informational. The two extra contexts strengthen the boundary and do not weaken or obscure the required architecture, security, missing-test, validation-theater, AI-write, go/no-go, P0/P1, and P2 contexts.

invalid_partial_attempts.result: API Error: 529 Overloaded. This was a server-side error and did not produce a valid review.

claude_cli.command: claude -p --model claude-opus-4-8 --effort max --permission-mode dontAsk --tools Read,Grep,Glob --disallowedTools Bash,Edit,Write,MultiEdit,NotebookEdit --output-format json

findings.title: Structured no-write cosmetic
findings.summary: Database/storage no-write is guaranteed by the declaration-only boundary and prior S01 convention.

findings.title: Context superset
findings.summary: The two extra contexts strengthen the boundary.

required_followups: Continue with RP00.P02.M04.S02 Request normalization as the next subphase.
review_notes: Claude confirmed M00 runtime contract remains exactly plan_authoring, ai_implementation_handoff, and hermes_validation.
Claude confirmed claude_review is not added to the M00 runtime entrypoint list.
Claude confirmed the contract is declaration-only and opens the Claude review workflow after RP00.P02.M03.S20.
Claude confirmed no runtime Claude invocation, no review queue writes, no audit writes, no service execution, and no runtime route creation.
Claude confirmed RP00.P02.M04 remains open and the next boundary is RP00.P02.M04.S02.
parsed_review.summary: Claude reported GO and no P0/P1/P2 issues. P3 notes are informational.

raw_claude_cli_result_summary.summary: Claude returned GO with no P0/P1/P2 findings and two P3 informational notes.
